☆ OVERWATCH // GABRIEL REYES [ Blackwatch / Pre-Fall of Overwatch ]

Commander Reyes is in his office at Swiss HQ, having a shitty morning. Maybe you should try to cheer him up...? (Or leave him the fuck alone, that's probably safer)
